run.method: Final four-way review: a full-PR reviewer, a shell/CI reviewer, a skill-corpus reviewer, and a root-agent reproduction pass dry-ran each public scenario against the leaned skill and its disclosed references. Runtime defects found by the run were fixed before these pass observations were recorded.

cases.scenario: Execute an approved change from an isolated feature worktree through implementation, evaluation, PR, and merge.
cases.observed_postcondition: The template resolves from the installed skill root, task commits and evaluation artifacts are checkable, and the PR reaches a terminal merge decision.

cases.scenario: Explore a feature and produce an OpenSpec proposal for human review without beginning implementation.
cases.observed_postcondition: The selected mode produces proposal, design, specs, and tasks artifacts before approval.

cases.scenario: Resolve the integration branch and recover a broken feature worktree.
cases.observed_postcondition: Branch resolution and worktree recovery end in observable git refs and registered worktree state.

cases.scenario: Create a worktree and launch a Codex or Claude worker for an approved change.
cases.observed_postcondition: A backend-specific worker handle exists, the host confirms it, and the worktree activity probe passes.

cases.scenario: Converge records and clean up after a merged pull request.
cases.observed_postcondition: OpenSpec is archived, story/layer state is updated, and the worktree is removed without touching unmerged work.

cases.scenario: Run one bounded autonomous tick over several ready and active stories.
cases.observed_postcondition: The tick applies ordering invariants, performs at most one launch/wrap, writes atomic state, and pauses at strategic gates.

cases.scenario: Audit an existing interface against usability, accessibility, and theory-grounded heuristics.
cases.observed_postcondition: Findings identify evidence, theory, severity, and an actionable recommendation.

cases.scenario: Select a host-compatible backend and verify a new workspace worker is alive.
cases.observed_postcondition: Selection returns a supported mode; liveness combines a mode-specific host check with worktree activity.

cases.scenario: Define and run a reusable generator/evaluator contract for an artifact.
cases.observed_postcondition: Independent findings and scores conform to the declared schema and recovery ladder.

cases.scenario: Capture a downstream process lesson and route it into the AEP upstream review flow.
cases.observed_postcondition: A structured feedback artifact records evidence, scope, proposed change, and upstream destination.

cases.scenario: Author a bounded multi-agent harness for a task too large for one context.
cases.observed_postcondition: The generated workflow has deterministic inputs, bounded workers, state transitions, and verification.

cases.scenario: Capture human visual-quality judgments before an alignment layer.
cases.observed_postcondition: A dimension-specific calibration file records examples, decisions, and acceptance cues.

cases.scenario: Score the ready queue and hand off one next story.
cases.observed_postcondition: Canonical scoring yields one selected story and a readiness-band-specific handoff.

cases.scenario: Frame a product opportunity and decide whether it merits downstream planning.
cases.observed_postcondition: The opportunity, personas, constraints, activities, and decision are persisted in valid product context.

cases.scenario: Turn product intent into architecture, stories, layers, waves, and topology.
cases.observed_postcondition: The resulting graph has dependencies, release layers, conflict-aware waves, and agent topology.

cases.scenario: Create an object-first information architecture for UI-facing stories.
cases.observed_postcondition: Objects, relationships, calls to action, and attributes are recorded before screen design.

cases.scenario: Classify a concrete post-ship learning and update the correct product phase.
cases.observed_postcondition: Evidence is classified once, routed to the canonical field, and appended to the changelog.

cases.scenario: Validate an artifact, completed implementation, or RFC with separate generator and evaluator roles.
cases.observed_postcondition: The selected mode emits independent findings, applies bounded fixes, and rechecks the target artifact.

cases.scenario: Ingest telemetry, deduplicate it, and create evidence-backed refinement stories.
cases.observed_postcondition: Normalized observations are deduplicated and either update an existing story or create one new refinement story.

cases.scenario: Upgrade a thin test helper into a three-tier BDD and layer-gate skill.
cases.observed_postcondition: The project owns a canonical policy, journey templates, tier commands, and layer-gate loop.

cases.scenario: Install AEP into a new downstream repository and orient a first-time user.
cases.observed_postcondition: All installed links resolve locally or to explicit web resources, required tools are checked, and the user selects one entry path.

cases.scenario: Converge an existing repository onto the canonical AEP project layout.
cases.observed_postcondition: Audit detects layout drift, confirmed mechanical fixes converge idempotently, and ambiguous copies fail closed.
